Audit matrix

Audit waiver checklist

Audit waiver checklists matter when operators need a deterministic sequence for documenting why a reservation pool can temporarily skip a normal review step during incident recovery.

The checklist calls out exception triggers, dashboard checks, and the reservation guarantees that still have to be preserved.

It also links each waiver step back to the regional recovery playbooks used during incident review.
